case_title: GOLDEN, PHILIP et al VS DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY GOLDEN, PHILIP HAMILTON, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
